fill: light-dark(rgb(18, 170, 181), rgb(14, 145, 155)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(18, 170, 181), rgb(14, 145, 155));
fill: light-dark(rgb(22, 153, 211), rgb(34, 146, 196)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(22, 153, 211), rgb(34, 146, 196));
